title: Telemedicine Dispensing Procedure Version 1.0
summary: Provides practical guidance for licensed medical practitioners and pharmacists on telemedicine dispensing during crisis conditions, including secure and efficient medicine dispensing and compliance with pharmacy and professional rules.

theme_notes.digital_health.telehealth_digital_servic: Procedure for medicine dispensing through telemedicine.

notes: Related instruments: Related to NHRA Circular No. 14 of 2020 and pharmacy legislation
